Xitadel - The First Web3-Native Liquid Treasury Token (LTT) Protocol  What is an LTT (Liquid Treasury Token)? - A fixed-term, overcollateralized token backed by a project’s locked treasury assets - Lets teams raise USDC without selling their token or doing OTC deals - Functions like a bond: investors lend USDC and earn a fixed yield at maturity - Fully on-chain: all collateral, issuance, and repayment are tracked transparently - If repaid, investors get USDC & interest, the issuer gets collateral back - If defaulted, Investors claim the underlying collateral  <One Pager> https://business.xitadel.fi/  <Pitch Deck> https://docsend.com/view/nycq86t363mn7rq4  <X Thread> https://x.com/xitadel_fi/status/1916832277654385017
